{{Quote|While the loss of a single transport world normally be considered only a minor injury, the ship stolen by Captain Reder has proven to be much more significant. Using the ship's on-board computer, Reder learned the locations of many then-Alliance safe worlds and bases. He and Admiral Drommel used this information in a short by effective campaign against the Rebel forces at those bases, resulting in thousands of deaths.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]|<ref name="WBC" />}}
'''Dor Reder''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pirralor]]. A [[junior officer]] aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Pulsar (Star Destroyer)|''Pulsar'']] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Reder was captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] but managed to escape by stealing an Alliance [[Transport/Legends|transport]]. Reder joined the [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] forces of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gaen Drommel]], gaining command of the Star Destroyer ''[[Krieger]]''. Information about Alliance bases and [[Safe world/Legends|safe worlds]] gleaned from the stolen transport's [[Computer/Legends|computer]] was used to devastating effect when Drommel and Reder launched a campaign against them which was responsible for thousands of [[Death/Legends|deaths]].

==Biography==
Dor Reder was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] in [[35 BBY/Legends|35 BBY]] and hailed from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pirralor]]. Reder joined the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and was a [[junior officer]]<ref name="WBC" /> holding the rank of [[Commander/Legends|commander]],<ref name="J8">{{JournalCite|8|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}}</ref> who served aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Pulsar (Star Destroyer)|''Pulsar'']] while it was stationed in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]] during the construction of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]]. During the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the ''Pulsar'' surrendered to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] forces. Reder avoided capture, and led a group of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] crewmen,<ref name="WBC" /> including [[Niclara Varnillian]],<ref name="J8" /> who stole an Alliance [[Transport/Legends|transport]] and escaped. Reder joined [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gaen Drommel]]'s forces, where he was raised to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] and given command of the Star Destroyer ''[[Krieger]]''. Around [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], Reder and Admiral Drommel used information in the stolen [[Transport/Legends|transport's]] [[Computer/Legends|computers]] to discover the location of several Alliance [[Safe world/Legends|safe worlds]] and bases. A quick and effective campaign resulted in the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of thousands of individuals. By [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], the [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] recorded the ''Krieger''{{'s}} last known location as the [[Hanod system/Legends|Hanod system]]. Charged with [[Treason/Legends|treason]], sedition, murder of New Republic personnel, and destruction of New Republic property, the New Republic offered a reward of 45,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for his capture.<ref name="WBC" />

==Personality and traits==
Dor Reder was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was 1.8 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. He was a competent commander and naval tactician, with a speciality in maneuvering [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]].<ref name="WBC" />

==Skills and abilities==
Reder was trained to use a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], and he was skilled in stealth techniques. He was knowledgeable about [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]], and was familiar with [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucratic]] procedure. Reder was able to [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] capital ships, and was able to operate [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]], program and repair [[Computer/Legends|computers]], and bypass security systems.<ref name="WBC" />

==Equipment==
Captain Reder wore an [[Imperial officer's uniform/Legends|Imperial officer's uniform]], was armed with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], and carried a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] and [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]].<ref name="WBC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dor Reder was profiled in [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], a sourcebook published in [[1993]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. [[Mike Jackson]] provided the illustration of Reder for the book.
